method: separate self-critique pass after production deploy and smoke; checks original acceptance criteria against current focus-block proof and lab truth boundary

acceptanceCriteriaStatus.criterion: App shell navigation works across Today, Capture, Patterns, Experiments, Profile, and Privacy or equivalent surfaces.
acceptanceCriteriaStatus.evidence: npm run screenshot:mobile still traversed Today, Capture, Patterns, Experiments, Profile, and Privacy; production focus smoke opened Today/Capture/Privacy on both aliases.

acceptanceCriteriaStatus.criterion: Privacy policy/page is reachable from UI.
acceptanceCriteriaStatus.evidence: Production smoke opened /privacy on both aliases and verified heading Privacy policy and local data boundary.

acceptanceCriteriaStatus.criterion: Today has meaningful flow that changes visible state and persists.
acceptanceCriteriaStatus.evidence: Focus flow starts from generated plan, completes with note, marks 1/3 plan done, persists after refresh, and produces a Capture record.
Production smoke verified generated Focus block Capture; existing Playwright flow still saves/edits/deletes Capture records.

acceptanceCriteriaStatus.criterion: Patterns or Experiments show derived/demo state from actions when backend unavailable.
acceptanceCriteriaStatus.evidence: Existing Playwright flow still covers Patterns history/review and Experiments observation/decision; focus slice does not mutate these surfaces directly.
Local and production smoke verified focus completion and plan progress persisted after refresh.

acceptanceCriteriaStatus.criterion: Empty/loading/disabled/error states honest; buttons not decorative.
acceptanceCriteriaStatus.evidence: Start focus block disabled before plan; complete/stop controls appear only when active; completed state exposes next action; no backend/timer/reminder claims.

acceptanceCriteriaStatus.criterion: UI quality mobile/desktop inspected and no overlap/overflow.
acceptanceCriteriaStatus.evidence: screenshot:mobile passed mobile and desktop no-overflow checks; production smoke measured scrollWidth 390/clientWidth 390 on both aliases.

acceptanceCriteriaStatus.criterion: Deploy preview/production as approved with proof.
acceptanceCriteriaStatus.evidence: Production approved earlier; commit 50c9e48 pushed; lifemax-web and life-max-omega aliases Ready and smoke-passed.

acceptanceCriteriaStatus.criterion: Full LifeMax readiness including WHOOP/accounts/AI/Telegram/backend/shared context.
acceptanceCriteriaStatus.evidence: Lab preflight and boot packet remain red; the app truthfully remains browser-local demo behavior only.

defectsFoundThisCycle: Completed focus screenshot showed ambiguous Current item/Start focus block copy after completion.
Selected in-app browser tab was stuck on old data: error page from stale localhost outage.
First production smoke failed due Node 25 require plus top-level await ambiguity.
Second production smoke clicked before production hydration/control readiness and did not observe Quick Restart saved.
repairsMadeThisCycle: Added next_item to focus summary and changed completed/stopped panel copy to Last item, Next item, Start next focus block or disabled No open plan item.
Opened a fresh in-app browser tab for local route proof.
Reran production smoke as ESM import script.
Added networkidle/control readiness waits to production smoke; final run passed both aliases.
commandsAndResults: npm run test:fixtures pass: 1 file, 2 tests
npm run test:pwa pass: 1 file, 1 test
npm run screenshot:mobile pass: Next build plus 3 Playwright tests
vercel inspect both aliases pass Ready
production Playwright smoke final pass both aliases
stopContinueDecision: checkpoint, not complete: focus-block functionality is pushed/deployed/smoked; continue the broader goal with the next high-level function or lab shared-context repair, but do not call full LifeMax complete while lab preflight/boot are red.
